query:
WITH RECURSIVE chain AS (
            SELECT
                j.id,
                j.parent_job,
                j.flow_step_id,
                1 AS depth
            FROM v2_job j
            WHERE j.id = $1
          UNION ALL
            SELECT
                pj.id,
                pj.parent_job,
                pj.flow_step_id,
                c.depth + 1
            FROM chain c
            JOIN v2_job pj ON pj.id = c.parent_job
            WHERE c.parent_job IS NOT NULL
        )
        SELECT
            c.id,
            c.parent_job,
            c.flow_step_id,
            EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM v2_job_queue q WHERE q.id = c.parent_job) AS "parent_in_queue!"
        FROM chain c
        WHERE c.depth >= 1
        ORDER BY c.depth ASC
